name: healthcare_ransomware_incident_forces_lumen_tru_loy
premise: Tele-ICU coverage ends at midnight; rural spoke hospitals are asking for a protocol exception to keep higher-acuity patients locally. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare ransomware incident forces lumen tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Pharmacy and legal disagree on whether a one-time override can be issued before the next MAR administration cycle. The trade is not abstract: it is truth versus loyalty under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Marco Navarro
agents.identity: I am Marco Navarro, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mira Berg
agents.identity: I am Mira Berg, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if truth advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for loyalty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Marco Navarro must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Marco Navarro do?
